subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted! Be thou gladdened in heart, refreshed in spirit, and solaced in eyes through the bounties of thy gracious Lord. Know thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه انشرحی قلبا و انتعشی روحا و قری عینا بمواهب ربک الکریم و اعلمی
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
